options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -capture_latency
options.description: Indicates that the capture latency of the path must match the specified float value.

options.name: -check_type
options.description: Indicates that the check type matches the specified option. Valid values are {Setup Check | Hold Check | Clock Gating Setup Check | Library Clock Gating Setup Check | Clock Gating Hold Check | Library Clock Gating Hold Check | External Delay Assertion | Latch Borrowed Time Check | PulseWidth Check | ClockPeriod Check | Recovery Check | Removal Check | Skew Check | NoChangeSetup Check | NoChangeHold Check}

options.name: -clock
options.description: Allows to search the Clock Tree instead of the data path. Default: the tool searches the data path by default.

options.name: -comment
options.description: Specifies a comment that is associated with the category.

options.name: -critical_false_path
options.description: Specifies the critical false path.

options.name: -delay_of_any_inst
options.description: Indicates that the delay of any instance in the design matches the specified float value.

options.name: -delay_of_any_inst_not_of_celltype
options.description: <string> Indicates that the delay of any instance in the design not matching the specified celltype matches the specified float value.

options.name: -delay_of_any_inst_not_of_name
options.description: Indicates that the delay of any instance in the design not matching the specified name matches the specified float value.

options.name: -delay_of_any_inst_of_celltype
options.description: Indicates that the delay of any instance in the design matching the specified celltype matches the specified float value.

options.name: -delay_of_any_inst_of_name
options.description: Indicates that the delay of any instance in the design matching the specified name matches the specified float value.

options.description: Indicates that the delay of any net in the design matches the specified float value.

options.name: -delay_of_any_net_of_name
options.description: Indicates that the delay of any net in the design matching the specified name matches the specified float value.

options.name: -delay_of_every_inst_not_of_name
options.description: <string> Indicates that the delay of every instance in the design not matching the specified name matches the specified float value.

options.description: <string> Indicates that the delay of every instance in the design matching the specified celltype matches the specified float value.

options.name: -delay_of_every_inst_of_name
options.description: Indicates that the delay of every instance in the design matching the specified name matches the specified float value.

options.name: -delay_of_every_net
options.description: Indicates that the delay of every instance in the design matches the specified float value.

options.name: -delay_of_every_net_not_of_name
options.description: <string> Indicates that the delay of every net in the design not matching the specified name matches the specified float value.

options.name: -delay_of_every_net_of_name
options.description: Indicates that the delay of every net in the design matching the specified name matches the specified float value.

options.name: -file
options.description: Specifies the file name.

options.name: -from_cell
options.description: Indicates that the path must be from the specified cell.

options.description: Indicates that the path must be from the specified clock.

options.description: Indicates that the path must be from the specified clock edge.

options.description: Indicates that the path must be from the specified port pointer pattern.

options.name: -incr_delay_of_any_net
options.description: Indicates that the incremental delay of at least a net that matches the specified "float" value.

options.name: -incr_delay_of_every_net
options.description: Indicates that the incremental delay of every net that matches the specified "float" value.

options.name: -launch_latency
options.description: Indicates that the launch latency of the path must match the specified float value.

options.name: -master
options.description: Specifies that the new category should be created as a nested category of the specified master category. Default: the category is created as a new category at the top level.

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the name of the category to be created.

options.name: -number_of_insts
options.description: Indicates that the number of instances in the data segment (with launch and capture clock paths) must match the specified integer value.

options.name: -number_of_insts_not_of_celltype
options.description: <string> Indicates that the number of instances not matching the specified celltype match the specified integer value.

options.name: -number_of_insts_of_name
options.description: Indicates that the number of instances matching the specified instance name match the specified integer value.

options.name: -overwrite
options.description: Overwrites any predefined category with the same name in your category list.

options.name: -sdc
options.description: Creates a category based on the SDC constraint as per the specified SDC file name and line number.
